name: Litgrid AB
summary: Litgrid AB, together with its subsidiaries, operates electricity transmission systems in Lithuania. The company's services include electricity transmission; trading in balancing, regulating, and reserving power; grid services to third parties; system balancing; public interest services; provision of certificates of origin; and connection to the transmission grid. It serves electricity transmission network users, and electricity producers and suppliers. The company was formerly known as LITGRID turtas AB and changed its name to Litgrid AB in March 2011. The company was incorporated in 2010 and is based in Vilnius, Lithuania. Litgrid AB is a subsidiary of EPSO-G UAB.
